allowed_cidrs.description: Client IP allowlist in CIDR notation. Empty or absent allows all clients.

cooldown.description: Optional direct-model-only request-path cooldown configuration. When absent, default cooldown semantics apply (see [`CooldownConfig`] field docs for defaults).

cost.description: Per-token cost for budget tracking. Absent = no cost tracked.

display_name.description: Operator-facing unique label. Surfaces on `/v1/models`, `req.model` on chat completions, `ApiKey.allowed_models`, and the dashboard model list. `Resource::name()` returns this.

ensemble.description: Ensemble configuration for fan-out panel calls and judge synthesis.

model_name.description: Upstream model identifier sent in provider requests. `None` for routing and ensemble models.

provider.description: Upstream vendor identity used for dispatch, compatibility checks, telemetry, and access logs. `None` for routing and ensemble models.

provider_key_id.description: References a `ProviderKey` row by id. The bridge resolves this against `AisixSnapshot::provider_keys` at dispatch time to fetch the upstream secret + optional `api_base`. None for routing models.

routing.description: Virtual-router config. When set, the proxy walks `routing.targets` to pick a downstream Model and dispatches against THAT model's `provider` / `model_name` / `provider_key_id`. The fields on this entity are intentionally absent in that case.

stream_timeout.description: Maximum gap in milliseconds between upstream streaming chunks. `0` or absent falls back to `timeout`.

timeout.description: End-to-end timeout in milliseconds for non-streaming upstream calls. `0` or absent disables the non-streaming timeout.

CooldownConfig.description: Request-path cooldown settings for a direct model after retryable upstream failures.

default_seconds.description: Cooldown TTL in seconds when the upstream did not supply a `Retry-After` header (or `honor_retry_after=false`). Default: 30.

enabled.description: Whether cooldown is active for this model. Default: true. Set to `false` to disable cooldown entirely (the model stays in rotation regardless of upstream failures).

honor_retry_after.description: Whether to use the upstream's `Retry-After` header (seconds form) as the cooldown TTL when present. Default: true.

max_seconds.description: Upper bound on cooldown TTL. Caps a misbehaving upstream that returns an unreasonable `Retry-After` value. Default: 600 (10 min).

trigger_on_timeout.description: Whether request-path timeouts trigger cooldown. Default: true.

trigger_on_transport.description: Whether transport / decode / stream-abort errors trigger cooldown. Default: true.

trigger_statuses.description: Status codes that trigger cooldown. Default: `[401, 408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504]` — auth failures and rate limits + transient server errors. `400/403/422` etc. are caller mistakes and intentionally excluded.

judge.description: Direct model that combines successful panel responses.

min_responses.description: Minimum successful panel responses required to proceed to synthesis. Absent = `min(DEFAULT_MIN_RESPONSES, panel.len())`. A value larger than the panel is clamped to the panel size.

panel.description: Direct models called concurrently for each ensemble request.

timeout_ms.description: Per-call upstream deadline applied to each panel member and the judge call (in addition to each member model's own `timeout`). `0` or absent = no ensemble-level per-call deadline.

Judge.description: The judge model that synthesizes the panel responses into one answer. `model` references another `Model.display_name` (must be a direct model).

model.description: Model alias for the direct model that synthesizes panel responses.

synthesis_prompt.description: Optional override for the built-in synthesis prompt template. Absent = use the default template.

ModelCost.description: Per-token cost for budget tracking. Both values are in USD per 1,000 tokens.

input_per_1k.description: Input (prompt) token cost in USD per 1,000 tokens.

output_per_1k.description: Output (completion) token cost in USD per 1,000 tokens.

OnAllFilteredPolicy.description: Behavior when every routing target is filtered out by runtime health or cooldown state.

oneOf.description: Return `503` with a fixed `Retry-After` hint. Default.

Send to the original candidate list anyway, in declaration order. Preserves availability over caller-facing correctness. Use only when the operator explicitly accepts the risk of sending traffic to a target the gateway just probed as broken.

PanelMember.description: One member of an ensemble panel. `model` references another `Model.display_name` in the snapshot (must be a direct model).

model.description: Model alias for a direct model that receives one panel request.

seed.description: Optional sampling seed for THIS member's call — pairs with `temperature` for reproducible diversity. Absent = no seed override.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature for THIS member's call. Overrides the request's `temperature`, so a panel of the same model repeated N times still produces diverse answers (self-ensemble). Absent = leave the request's temperature unchanged.

weight.description: Reserved for the future voting/quorum strategy; ignored by the v1 synthesis path. Carried on the wire now so enabling voting later does not require a wire-format change.

rph.description: Requests per hour (3600s window). There is no per-hour token limit field.

rps.description: Requests per second (1s window). There is no per-second token limit field.

max_fallbacks.description: Max number of later targets to attempt after the initial target fails permanently. Defaults to all later targets.

on_all_filtered.description: Policy for the case where every candidate is filtered out by runtime status. See [`OnAllFilteredPolicy`].

retries.description: Retry attempts on the current target before failing over.

retry_on_429.description: Whether upstream 429 participates in retries and failover.

strategy.description: Strategy used to select a target for each request.

targets.description: Ordered set of direct models available to this routing model.

oneOf.description: Failover is the safest default — predictable order, no shared state, no surprises on first deploy.

RoutingTarget.description: One destination in a routing config. `model` references another `Model.name` in the snapshot.

model.description: Model alias for a direct model that can receive routed traffic.

weight.description: Only meaningful for `weighted`. Optional everywhere else; falls back to 1 when missing.
